case_title: PARACHUTE TECHNOLOGY, LLC VS. CHIGBU & CO., LLP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $902.50 FILED BY PARACHUTE TECHNOLOGY, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHIGBU & CO., LLP JOHN CHIGBU, OWNER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED JUN-18-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHIGBU & CO., LLP JOHN CHIGBU, OWNER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARACHUTE TECHNOLOGY, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHIGBU & CO., LLP JOHN CHIGBU, OWNER $478.75 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $543.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2012 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY CHIGBU, JOHN OWNER OF CHIGBU & CO., LLC HEARING SET FOR OCT-29-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELLE MCGILL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ASHLEY SMITH, JOE DOBROWOLSKI; CLINTON BLOODWORTH. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
